headline: Visa’s Capital Restructure Raises Fresh Questions On Future Shareholder Outcomes
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has completed a major exchange offer involving its Class B-1 and B-2 common shares. Roughly 98% of these shares were exchanged for a mix of Class B-3 and Class C common stock plus cash. The transaction materially reshapes Visa's capital structure and long term shareholder mix. For investors tracking NYSE:V, this capital move sits alongside a share price of about $325.75 and multi year returns of 42.8% over 3 years and 49.1% over 5 years. Over shorter periods, the stock is up...
